steps.title: Recognize the embedded clause
steps.content: The phrase in what introduces an embedded noun clause inside a declarative sentence. Embedded clauses use normal subject-verb word order and the sentence should end with a period.

steps.title: Reject question forms
steps.content:
• Choice B has correct word order but wrongly ends the declarative sentence with a question mark.
  • Choice C uses question word order and a question mark.
  • Choice D uses question word order even though it has a period.

steps.title: Use statement word order
steps.content: He viewed as unnecessary development supplies normal subject-verb order inside the embedded clause and ends the sentence correctly. The answer is A.
